---
title: "QGroundControl Planning a Mission"
id: material-fw-7
order: 90
summary: "Getting an idea how to practically plan and perform a flight mission with QGroundControl."
modules:
  - module-fieldwork
Goals:
  - module-goals-fw
activities:
  - activity-fw-11
assessments:
  - fw-assessment
labels:
  - basics
  - mandatory
  - YouTube 
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/UAVFieldwork/material-fw-7.md"
---

## Planning and Running a Mission

Watch the QGroundControl mission planning video:

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0d23O_RUOmI>

## Connected Module

- [Autonomous Flights Made Easy](../modules/module-fieldwork.qmd)
